overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's urban streets. The player moves from a covered sidewalk under an elevated highway, past neon-lit storefronts and steam vents, across intersections with futuristic vehicles, and through dense cyberpunk architecture with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with industrial green building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing industrial vents and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Forbes' mounted on the building corner
green-painted industrial building facade with large ventilation fans and graffiti
large industrial circular ventilation fan with spinning blades
massive concrete elevated highway overpass casting shadows on the street below
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a shaded sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass. The camera moves forward past a green industrial building featuring large spinning ventilation fans and a 'Forbes' street sign. The environment is quiet with no visible pedestrians or vehicles, emphasizing the urban infrastructure and concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and futuristic vehicle traffic

events.description: blue sports car drives past from right to left across the intersection
camera turns right to follow the street direction and observe the red apartment building

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection corner then observing traffic while preparing to cross, watching the blue sports car pass by

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall red residential building with distinctive circular windows and external air conditioning units
sleek blue futuristic sports car with aerodynamic design
bold yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
tall holographic advertising billboards with bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit intersection where a blue sports car passes by. The camera turns to reveal a distinctive red apartment building with circular windows. The environment transitions from the shaded overpass to open sky with direct sunlight illuminating the crosswalk and street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon signs and steam vents

events.description: entering darker covered walkway with neon lighting and commercial storefronts
steam vent releases white smoke across the walkway creating atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market area passing neon signs and steam vents, following a pedestrian with red hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and green backpack walking ahead under the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof structure providing partial cover over the sidewalk
bright neon sign with the word 'OPEN' in orange and blue colors
ground-level vent emitting thick white steam into the walkway
massive futuristic skyscraper with smoke plumes rising from the top, visible at the end of the walkway
red neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' above a storefront
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display and product images

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a darker covered walkway illuminated by neon signs including a prominent 'OPEN' sign and 'FOODSCAPE' restaurant signage. Steam vents create atmospheric effects as the camera follows a pedestrian with red hair. In the distance, a massive skyscraper with smoke plumes becomes visible at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside highway with palm trees and holographic billboards

events.description: exiting the darker covered section into brighter sunlight while remaining under the overpass
black car drives past on the adjacent road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk with palm trees visible, passing other pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and teal jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street visible beyond the covered walkway
large purple and pink holographic billboard with animated graphics
curved concrete ramp of the elevated highway system
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens to brighter light while remaining covered, revealing palm trees and massive holographic billboards. The camera passes pedestrians including one with distinctive purple hair. Traffic moves along the adjacent road as the camera continues forward, with the tall skyscraper now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with crosswalk and moderate vehicle traffic

events.description: silver SUV drives past from left to right while crossing the intersection
finishing crossing the street and approaching the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while observing passing vehicles including a silver SUV

notable_agents.action: silver SUV driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk spanning the intersection
futuristic silver SUV with boxy angular design
green-painted sidewalk section on the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway and crosses a wide sunlit intersection via a yellow crosswalk. A silver SUV passes by as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk. The environment opens up completely with full sky visibility, palm trees lining the street, and the elevated highway structure now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded depths of urban infrastructure into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic city center. It begins on a quiet sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass, moving past a green industrial building with spinning ventilation fans and a Forbes street sign. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where a blue sports car passes by a red apartment building with circular windows. The movement then shifts back into a darker covered walkway filled with neon signs and steam vents, following a red-haired pedestrian toward a distant, smoking skyscraper. Finally, the camera passes under holographic billboards and palm trees before exiting the walkway to cross a wide, sunlit intersection via a yellow crosswalk, fully revealing the towering skyline and the highway structure to the left.
